name: Thread.Browser

aliases.name: Program
aliases.type: Platform.Program flags (Thread.Browser.Model shared global local) (Thread.Browser.Msg global local)

values.name: application
values.type: { init : shared, procedure : flags -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local, view : shared -> Thread.Browser.Document global, subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global, onUrlRequest : Browser.UrlRequest -> global, onUrlChange : Url.Url -> global } -> Thread.Browser.Program flags shared global local

values.name: document
values.type: { init : shared, procedure : flags -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local, view : shared -> Thread.Browser.Document global, subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global } -> Thread.Browser.Program flags shared global local

values.name: element
values.type: { init : shared, procedure : flags -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local, view : shared -> Html.Html global, subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global } -> Thread.Browser.Program flags shared global local

name: Thread.Lifter

aliases.name: Lifter
aliases.comment: Use to convert shared memory types.
aliases.type: { get : a -> b, set : b -> a -> a }

values.name: compose
values.type: Thread.Lifter.Lifter a b -> Thread.Lifter.Lifter b c -> Thread.Lifter.Lifter a c

name: Thread.Procedure

unions.name: Procedure
unions.comment:
Procedures to be processed in a thread.

  - shared: Shared memory
  - global: Global events
  - local: Local events that only affect on the forked thread itself

values.name: await
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that awaits the local events for the thread.

If it returns `Nothing`, it awaits again.
Otherwise, it evaluates the given `Procedure`.
values.type: (local -> shared -> Maybe.Maybe (Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local)) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: awaitGlobal
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that awaits global events.

If it returns `Nothing`, it awaits again.
Otherwise, it evaluates the given `Procedure`.
values.type: (global -> shared -> Maybe.Maybe (Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local)) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: batch
values.comment: Batch `Procedure`s together. The elements are evaluated in order.
values.type: List.List (Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: documentView
values.type: (shared -> Browser.Document global) -> Thread.Procedure.Model shared global local -> Browser.Document (Thread.Procedure.Msg global local)

values.name: elementView
values.type: (shared -> Html.Html global) -> Thread.Procedure.Model shared global local -> Html.Html (Thread.Procedure.Msg global local)

values.name: fork
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that evaluates the given `Procedure` in a forked thread.

The forked thread runs independently of the original thread.
i.e., The subsequent `Procedure`s in the original thread are evaluated immediately.
values.type: (() -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: init
values.type: shared -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local -> ( Thread.Procedure.Model shared global local, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Thread.Procedure.Msg global local) )

values.name: liftShared
values.type: Thread.Lifter.Lifter a b -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure b global local -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure a global local

values.name: modify
values.comment: Construct a `Procedure` instance that modifies shared memory state.
values.type: (shared -> shared) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: none
values.comment: Construct a `Procedure` instance that do nothing.
values.type: Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: onUrlChange
values.type: (Url.Url -> global) -> Url.Url -> Thread.Procedure.Msg global local

values.name: onUrlRequest
values.type: (Browser.UrlRequest -> global) -> Browser.UrlRequest -> Thread.Procedure.Msg global local

values.name: push
values.comment: Construct a `Procedure` instance that pushes a local `Cmd`.
values.type: (shared -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd local) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: quit
values.comment:
Quit the thread immediately.

Subsequent `Procedures` are not evaluated and are discarded.
values.type: Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: (shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global) -> Thread.Procedure.Model shared global local -> Platform.Sub.Sub (Thread.Procedure.Msg global local)

values.name: syncAll
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that wait for all given `Procedure`s to be completed.

Given `Procedure`s are evaluated in the independent thread, but the subsequent `Procedure`s in the original thread are **not** evaluated immediately.
values.type: List.List (Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global local

values.name: update
values.type: Thread.Procedure.Msg global local -> Thread.Procedure.Model shared global local -> ( Thread.Procedure.Model shared global local, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Thread.Procedure.Msg global local) )

values.name: wrapGlobal
values.type: (a -> Maybe.Maybe b) -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared b local -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared a local

values.name: wrapLocal
values.type: Thread.Wrapper.Wrapper a b -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global b -> Thread.Procedure.Procedure shared global a

name: Thread.Wrapper

aliases.name: Wrapper
aliases.comment: Use to convert local event types.
aliases.type: { unwrap : a -> Maybe.Maybe b, wrap : b -> a }

values.name: compose
values.type: Thread.Wrapper.Wrapper a b -> Thread.Wrapper.Wrapper b c -> Thread.Wrapper.Wrapper a c
